description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.1 Docker image. In the global before_script download and extract the Testspace client with curl -fsSL https://testspace-client.s3.amazonaws.com/testspace-linux.tgz | tar -zxvf- -C /usr/local/bin and configure it using testspace config url http://$TS_TOKEN:@$TS_ORG.stridespace.com. Define a single stage named test and a job called job1 that runs in this stage executing the command testspace -v. After the job finishes, run the global after_script testspace test.xml to publish the test results.
